name: observe_only
label: Observe only
description: Collect evidence and prove an already healthy target without changing it.
verification: healthy heartbeat younger than three seconds

name: restart_sandbox_worker
label: Restart disposable worker
description: Restart only the synthetic worker created by this demo.
verification: new healthy heartbeat younger than three seconds

name: terminate_sandbox_worker
label: Terminate disposable worker
description: Stop only the synthetic worker; useful for a deliberately hung process scenario.
